name: PluginPickerInput
summary: The PluginPickerInput class represents a predefined set of picker inputs that can be provided to a plug-in object. It replaces the interactive selection of points and/or objects by the user when the plug-in is inserted into a drawing through the API.

constructors.name: PluginPickerInput
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the PluginPickerInput class with an empty list of picker inputs.

constructors.name: PluginPickerInput
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the PluginPickerInput class which contains a predefined sequence of inputs.

methods.name: Add
methods.summary: Appends a picker input to the plug-in input.

methods.name: AddRange
methods.summary: Appends several picker inputs to the picker input sequence.
